name: io.github.flikah/scout-mcp
title: Scout
description: Real estate agent directory + lead routing. Find licensed real estate agents by geography, search MLS listings (SC + GA), route buyer/seller leads, and subscribe to proprietary seller-intent signals (probate, NOD, FSBO). Operated by Flika Realty LLC, a real estate brokerage licensed in South Carolina and Georgia.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token for authenticated tools (scout.route_lead, scout.get_seller_signals). Anonymous access works without this header for scout.coverage, scout.search_listings, and scout.find_agent. Request a key at spencer@flikah.com.
